title: Agent-Friendly Source Registry — Restaurant Openings & Ticketed Event Calendars
description: Curated registry of newspaper, magazine, ticketing-platform, and CVB sources for restaurant openings/recommendations and dated ticketed event calendars across major US cities. Each source is probed for HTTP reachability, robots.txt disposition, RSS feeds, JSON-LD/schema.org markup, and rendering framework, then assigned an agent_compatibility rating and recommended access method.

agent_compatibility_legend.excellent: RSS feed available — parse XML directly, lightest-weight option
agent_compatibility_legend.good: Reachable via standard HTTP fetch; may need browser if JS-rendered
agent_compatibility_legend.fair: Reachable but robots.txt disallows PerplexityBot — use browser_task respectfully
agent_compatibility_legend.url_invalid: URL returned 404 — needs path correction before use

recommended_methods_legend.rss_feed: Fetch the rss_url directly with HTTP — parse as RSS/Atom XML
recommended_methods_legend.http_fetch_or_browser: Standard fetch works; fall back to browser_task if content is JS-loaded
recommended_methods_legend.browser_task (JS-rendered): Page uses React/Next/Nuxt — use browser automation
recommended_methods_legend.browser_task (Cloudflare/anti-bot 403): Direct HTTP blocked — must use real browser
recommended_methods_legend.browser_task (robots.txt disallows Perpl: Honor robots — use browser_task and be conservative with request volume
recommended_methods_legend.find_correct_url: URL pattern invalid — search the publisher's site for the correct path
recommended_methods_legend.investigate: Probe failed for unknown reason — manual investigation needed

restaurant_openings.name: Eater (national)
restaurant_openings.notes: Curated 'X city openings this month' monthly posts per vertical
